Iftar and Eid Meetings were Held with the Participation of All Our Members

28.04.2022

Our feast and iftar programs were held on Wednesday, April 27 at the Ibn Haldun University Complex.

With the participation of all our members, our feast and iftar programs, where we experience the beauties of the month of Ramadan together, were held on Wednesday, April 27 at the Ibn Haldun University Complex.

Our Chairman of the Board of Trustees Prof. İrfan Gündüz and our Rector Prof. Atilla Arkan made short greeting speeches during the festive celebration held with the participation of academic and administrative staff. Then it was time to celebrate the Ramazan eid.

In the evening, an iftar program was held with the intense participation of our members of the Board of Trustees, academic and administrative staff, graduates and students.
